status_breakdown.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms

events_with_summaries.title: Identifying the correct Styrofoam type for recycling
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Backroom: Sending the wrong Styrofoam to Used Asset Centers increases costs and risks contaminating recyclable materials. Use a simple bend test at the store – rigid pieces should be returned, while flexible pieces should be disposed of on site.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 10: New Oil Filters and Modular Update
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 10: Select stores will receive Ecogard and Premium Guard oil filters for ACC bay use only to improve in-stocks and reduce service delays, with an expanded air and cabin filter modular arriving in week 16.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 46: Glamnetic Nail Care Graphic Audit
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 46: A secondary shipment of Glamnetic bullnose graphic kits is on the way to about 600 stores that missed them during the reset. Use the Graphics Store List Lookup Tool, locate and install the kit, and verify items are stocked and tagged to standard.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95 \| Oreo Stuf of Legends Removal
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 95 and Backroom: Oreo Stuf of Legends is exiting the assortment. Mondelēz will lead the pull, but stores must confirm all product is removed and credited by April 17. Verify all units are cleared, ensure accurate receiving and dispose of product after credit to maintain inventory accuracy and secure store credit.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 13: Air Care - Upcoming Modular Changes (Anderson Support)
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 13: Anderson will support Air Care modular updates in week 12 at Supercenters and week 14 at Neighborhood Markets, including item removals, shelf/price tag resets, and discontinued product clearance support.

events_with_summaries.title: FY27 InHome Driver Safety Calendar
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Store Fulfillment: The FY27 InHome Driver Safety Calendar gives stores and drivers a year-long plan to stay focused on safe delivery practices. Each month features a safety theme based on real-world risks and Lytx insights, with clear actions and in-app messages to reinforce key behaviors. Stores should print the calendar from the Safety Enterprise Hub and post it in the InHome backroom for daily visibility.

events_with_summaries.title: Trip-Based Batching for Orders Delivered by Uber
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Store Fulfillment: Orders delivered by Uber will soon use trip-based batching, similar to the Spark Driver platform, allowing associates to stage orders by Trip ID for a more efficient workflow. This change reduces extra steps, improves accuracy and creates smoother backroom flow as delivery volume grows. With trip labels and simplified dispensing, teams can prep and hand off orders more quickly while spending more time serving customers.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 72: Week 12 Samsung TV Item Swap
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 72: We’ll receive the new 2026 Samsung 55" TVs in weeks 11 and 12 to support a week 12 modular item swap. The outgoing 2025 55" model will be marked down for clearance. The new model will be set on the Medium TV modular, including updating the display.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 29: Set Joyspun Intimates Week 5 Mods
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 29: Stores are asked to make sure they've set the week 5 mod for Joyspun bras and underwear.  Sales are reported at under 80% despite store mod set showing at 98%.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: Fight Hunger. Spark Change. Is Off to a Great Start
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 92: The fight hunger spark change campaign is off to a great start. In the second week of the campaign, stores should focus on keeping the features and seasonal aisle full and maintained.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: Item Spotlight – Nissin Cup Noodles 6-pack Cups
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 92: Nissin Cup Soup 6-pack has a new low price of $2.97 and is a great VPI choice for store associates. The new low price along with the week 10 feature will drive units and increase sales.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: The Great American Grill Out – Celebrating America's Birthday
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 92: To celebrate America's 250th birthday, stores will have a new and improved Grilling Train. Items will include buns, Coca-Cola and Frito Lay chips along with a selection of core condiments. Many of the items are on Rollback and will be a featured through May and June.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: This Is the Year of the Taco
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 92: The year of the taco will kick-off in week 12 with the Tacos, Enchiladas and Salsa modular relay. This set is all about making Walmart the go-to destination for taco night with exclusive items, new innovation and globally inspired products.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95: Gatorade Gatorlyte 12oz 6pk Multipack Delay
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 95: Gatorade is launching a Gatorlyte 12oz, 6-pack multi-pack with Strawberry Kiwi and Orange flavors, but this product will not be available for the week 9 modular relay. The AMP message contains an item swap that stores should execute until the product is available.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95: Pepsi 12-Pack and 1.25 Liter Rollbacks
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 95: Pepsi and Mountain Dew branded 12oz, 12-pack cans are going on Rollback for $6, and the 1.25 liter bottles will be on Rollback for $1. Stores should work with their Pepsi representatives to make sure the have proper inventory levels for both the features and side counter.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95: Select Bubly 12oz Cans Will Move to Warehouse Delivery
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 95: Beginning Monday, April 13, select Bubly 12oz, 8-pack cans will transition from Pepsi DSD to Walmart warehouse delivery. Walmart will assume full ownership of delivery, merchandising and shelf maintenance for all Bubly 8-pack items.

events_with_summaries.title: Submit Cooler Shelf Depth Measurement
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Departments 80 and 97: Measure cooler shelf depth using only the shelf surface to improve modular execution and availability, then submit results in the Cooler Shelving Size Survey.

events_with_summaries.title: D97 Dinner Solutions Update
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: We are experiencing supply issues with Marketside chicken teriyaki bowls, impacting all DCs. Recovery is expected over the next two weeks. In the interim, fill the empty shelves with adjacent items to fill assortment gaps until items return to full recovery. Check Fresh Weekly Messages each week for updates.

events_with_summaries.title: Dep. 94: Produce Updates
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: In Produce, Department 94, some items continue to face supply constraints (bok choy, broccoli, cilantro, Napa cabbage, carrots, kiwis, lettuce and slicing and Roma tomatoes, with damage caused by harsh weather driving the disruptions across most items. Some items have begun to see yields increase, but most items will be in short supply for several more weeks. Seasonal favorite stone fruits transition from imported crops to domestic crops this week. With this, white nectarines exit, yellow peaches and nectarines begin to flow, and week 16, plums will arrive. Enter a store number in the Seasonal Stone Fruit Store Lookup Tool to determine if the store will receive yellow nectarines and/or yellow peaches in bulk or bagged quantities.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 93: Week 11 Merch Message
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: This week in Department 93 (Fresh Meat), teams should walk the recently set modulars to protect integrity post-Easter. At a glance, misaligned protein dividers is a quick indicator something is off. Focus on the grilling season with key features of burgers, chicken breasts and wings as summer demand ramps up.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 97: Dinner Solutions Supply Interruptions
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: We are experiencing supply issues with select Marketside and Freshness Guaranteed items, including Freshness Guaranteed chilled chicken and Marketside foil bakes, orange chicken, chicken teriyaki, and for some DCs, ultimate and supreme pizzas. Recovery is expected over the next two to four weeks. In the interim, fill the empty shelves with adjacent items to fill assortment gaps until items return to full recovery. Check Fresh Weekly Messages each week for updates.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 98 and 81: Week 11 Bakery and Bread Updates
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Fully reset the Bakery Department back to core assortment, keep it clean and full, and be sure to feature Mini Muffins and 28-count Cookie Box Rollbacks. In Commercial Bread, work through the Buns and Rolls markdowns ahead of the week 13 modular (category 103) and keep tortillas full and priced correctly for upcoming events: Cinco de Mayo (Tuesday, May 5), Mother's Day (Sunday, May 10), Memorial Day (Monday, May 25), graduations (late May), A250 (Saturday, July 4) and the FIFA World Cup (Thursday, June 11 to Sunday, July 19).

events_with_summaries.title: Prepare for High-Volume Cake Orders Celebrating Mother’s Day and Graduation
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Mother’s Day (Sun, May 10) and late-May graduations will drive a major cake-order surge, with peak demand expected Thu–Sun, May 7–10 and potential overlap with graduation events. Last year, stores met ~85% of demand, leaving 15% unfilled. Market managers should ensure stores build modular backstock from Apr 11–17 through Week 14 (May 2–8) to shift focus to peak-day fulfillment. Recommend staffing support so Cake Decorators can decorate while another associate handles staging, cleaning, customer service and calls. If volume becomes unmanageable, partner with stores to submit a Store Support ticket to pause cake orders.

events_with_summaries.title: Check It Out: Front End Training for New Associates
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: New Front End Training Guides, with exportable checklists, are now available to support Front End associates' growth and success.

events_with_summaries.title: Frontend: Your Front End Operations Resolution Team is Here to Help!
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: The Front End Operations Resolution Team is available to answer store questions about the Front End and Financial Services offered in stores.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 11:  Tool World Markdowns
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 11: First markdowns are coming for select week 17 hardware categories. Make sure items are signed with clearance flags but do not move them to the clearance aisle.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 19: Cat. 350 Yarn Changes
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Cat. 350 Yarn Changes: Boye tool inventory is recovering later than planned because of supplier constraints. Some airfreight is expected to arrive in stores in weeks 13-16. Full recovery is now expected by week 20. We will delete 28 items in week 29 as we transition suppliers.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 9: Camping Pallet Train Delay
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: The Dept. 9 camping pallet train is delayed, so stores should hold the planned space, avoid ordering extra product, set the feature immediately upon arrival and note rollbacks are extended through July 20.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 9: Turkey Season
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 9: Stock Stoeger turkey guns and .410 TSS turkey ammo for customers now, prepare for week 16 clearance and the modular transition, and post online-pickup ammo signage only if your store is activated.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 71: Action Required - Replace Xavier TV Stand
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 71: Stores should focus on selling the black version of the Xavier TV stand as the brown version sells out.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 74: Item Delays for Week 12 Mod Update
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 74: All new modular items will arrive late for the week 12 mod set for Food Storage.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 74: Week 12 Modular Updates
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 74: Most new items for the week 12 modular update are in PDQs. Select stores will get Rubbermaid Pack and Go on the 28-foot Food Storage Modular, replacing Sistema.

events_with_summaries.title: Home: Mainstays Kids Brand Launch – Key Updates
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: In Home, stores are getting ready for a second round of markdowns as they prepare for the week 14 Mainstays Kids launch.

events_with_summaries.title: AI Tip of the Week
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text:
Keep Calm and Ask My Assistant. AI Tip of the Week.

Your days are busy, and it can be easy to forget a task or when something is due. Ask My Assistant to create a weekly and, or monthly checklist to follow. This can help keep you organized and not miss any steps.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 18/67: Mother’s Day, Graduation and Patriotic Updates
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 18/67: Seasonal update: maintain Mother’s Day modulars, set Graduation/Patriotic, refresh Celebrations Value Wall, and support balloons/cards plus Teacher Appreciation gifts.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 56: Watering Guide and Best Practices
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 56: Use proper wand and water mat practices and water twice daily using the correct procedure to prevent under- or over-watering that can damage plants.

events_with_summaries.title: High Heat Weather Notification Emails
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Stores will now get hot weather alert emails when temperatures are forecasted to hit 90 degrees or higher. Leaders should share the alert with the team and follow the Heat Related Illness Prevention Plan to help prevent heat-related illness. Questions? Email BeSafe@walmart.com or call 800-530-9923.

events_with_summaries.title: Sales Tax Exemption Validation Changes
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Sales tax exemption validation has changed. Customers will only be tax-exempt if they’re approved in the state where the purchase is made. Otherwise, sales tax will be charged automatically at checkout. Customers can submit or update exemptions online. Individuals can go to Walmart.com/tax-exemption, and businesses can go to Business.Walmart.com/GoTaxExempt.
